channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Veteran Sharks defenseman recalls moment when he realized injury “was pretty bad”
item.description: San Jose Sharks' Marc-Edouard Vlasic said his upper-body injury is improving, hopes to return within a couple weeks
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Boxer Mike Tyson shares message of support to embattled music mogul Diddy: 'I wish him all the best'
item.description: Sean "Diddy" Combs has been associated with Mike Tyson over the decades. The rapper has been jailed since his September arrest on federal sex trafficking and racketeering charges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area high school football roundup 2024: Best of Week 7 action
item.description: Dublin, Gunn, Moreau Catholic, Pioneer, Pinole Valley, South San Francisco among winners on seventh weekend of the high school football season.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: No experience, no problem: Acalanes’ Josh Elerts scores two TDs in first ever game at running back
item.description: Despite having never played running back in his life, Josh Elerts rushed for 81 yards and scored two touchdowns as Acalanes outdueled Miramonte
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Yamamoto outduels Darvish in historic matchup as Dodgers beat Padres 2-0 to reach NLCS
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers shelled out $1 billion for Japanese talent in the offseason and it's paying off in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Aggies comeback falls short against UNLV, 50-34
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State fell into too big of a hole against UNLV on Friday night, and despite a valiant second half comeback, the Aggies lost their fifth straight game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins first career MLB playoff series as Dodgers beat Padres in historic game
item.description: With a tight 2-0 win over the San Diego Padres in Game 5 at home on Friday, the Dodgers won their first playoff series of the current postseason format.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephan Jaeger chips in twice and shoots 63 to lead Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Stephan Jaeger made up for a three-putt from 10 feet by chipping in for birdie on consecutive holes Friday for an 8-under 63 that gave him a one-shot lead before the second round was suspended by darkness at the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift fans side with Caitlin Clark after Angel Reese interviews Travis Kelce's ex-girlfriend
item.description: Taylor Swift fans are flocking to support Caitlin Clark, a lifelong Chiefs fan, after Angel Reese interviewed the ex-girlfriend of Swift's boyfriend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WNBA has just 1 Black head coach but more could come from a pool of strong assistants in the league
item.description: The WNBA has been praised in the past as a leader for its diversity hiring practices. That hasn't changed, but some things have. At the end of the 2022 season, half of the 12 head coaches in the league were Black.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Todd Downing tasked with helping Aaron Rodgers and Jets' struggling offense after 'unique week'
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets' offense appeared on their way toward the efficient, high-scoring and productive force they fully expected they'd be this season. A lot has certainly changed in the last three weeks.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Local MMA fighter gets UFC tryout
item.description: “First thing to come into my mind, this is is an opportunity to hop on Everest,” said Chasen Blair, a local MMA fighter.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: PHOTOS: Padres look to rebound in game 2 of NLDS against Dodgers
item.description: Photos: The San Diego Padres are facing off against the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 2 of the NL Division Series on Sunday, with Yu Darvish starting for the Padres.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Real Salt Lake clinches home playoff game with 1-0 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake will be home for the playoffs, at least in the first round. RSL (15-7-11) extended its five-game unbeaten run with a 1-0 win away at San Jose, as Zac MacMath recorded his second straight clean sheet in goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
